description: This file defines a FocusTrap class used to manage focus within a specific DOM element, typically for accessibility purposes. It includes methods to activate and deactivate the focus trap, handling focus events and keydown events for tab navigation.

classes.name: FocusTrap
classes.description: A class that manages trapping focus within a specified DOM element, ensuring keyboard navigation stays within that element.

methods.name: activate
methods.description: Activates the focus trap, setting focus to the trap element if autofocus is enabled, and attaching event listeners for focusin and keydown events.

methods.name: deactivate
methods.description: Deactivates the focus trap, removing event listeners.

methods.name: _handleFocusin
methods.description: Handles focusin events to ensure focus remains within the trap element, cycling focus to the first or last focusable element as needed.

methods.name: _handleKeydown
methods.description: Handles keydown events to detect Tab key presses and determine navigation direction.
